name: “The Nocturnal”
description:
Noctis, a small, sickly but fierce slugcat with origins in Shaded Citadel, was forced out of her home by the impending collapse of Five Pebbles’ superstructure. She made it to Shoreline, where she meets a potential meal.

Noctis (The Nocturnal) is one of my Rain World OCs, probably my most recognizable one. She’s a fluffy slugcat who was infected with a parasite that makes her cannibalistic, though she can also eat lanternmice and scavengers for the same effects if you don’t want to feed her a consistent diet of slugcats.

I’m sorry if she kills you, she’s hungry -v-
creator: synxxco
